channel.title: Student Projects on tobeif-DTU
channel.description: Recent content in Student Projects on tobeif-DTU

item.title: Siemens Fonden supports DTU Remanufactory student
item.description: Fantastic appreciation from Siemens Fonden to one our Remanufactory BSc students. In his thesis, Mikkel has worked on an initial batch-disassembly prototype (incl. variant and feature recognition, tool changer, data extraction, etc.) to explore the technologies that will be at the heart of our rapid value recovery disassembly setup in our newly established Remanufactory lab. And we look more than forward to keeping Mikkel as part of that story as the grant will allow him to further develop his alpha prototype during his MSc studies.
